title: Custody Convoy Yard
notes: Connects E4 Logistics Route, D5 Pressure Service Route, and future F5/E6 custody transfer routes.
Custody convoy yard with van scan gate, holding pens, van parking pads, transfer holding room, custody cage, service/fuel pads, and hidden rescue marks.
Designed for custody vans, Civic Patrol cruisers, blockade cars, and Astro Van traversal.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
